roles.name: Watchtower Architect
roles.description: Designs the over-arching solution from the orbital Watchtower — sees how every hero, gadget and contingency interlocks.

roles.name: League Field Commander
roles.description: Marshals the team in the field — owns the timeline, the comms grid, and the after-action report.

roles.name: Batcomputer Operator
roles.description: Curator of the Batcomputer's records — fields, layouts, permission sets and case files.

roles.name: Bat-Gadget Engineer
roles.description: Forges the bespoke tools in the Batcave workshop — Apex, LWC, and platform widgets.

roles.name: Hall of Justice Chief — USA
roles.description: Leads the senior practice from the Hall of Justice — sets the standards every chapter follows.

roles.name: Senior Titan — Mumbai Tower
roles.description: Veteran of many missions — runs delivery streams from the Mumbai Tower.

roles.name: Junior Titan — Mumbai Tower
roles.description: Rising hero — handles configuration and discovery under the Senior Titan's wing.

roles.name: Boom Tube Architect — USA
roles.description: Designs the Boom Tubes between systems — the great spans that move data across the Multiverse.

roles.name: Senior Boom Tube Engineer
roles.description: Builds the stable Boom Tubes — APIs, middleware, event flows under the Architect's plan.

roles.name: Boom Tube Apprentice
roles.description: Learns the craft of integration — webhooks, batch jobs, callouts, and the rules of stable transit.

roles.name: Crime Lab Tech
roles.description: Tests every piece of evidence and every build — finds the flaw before the villain does.

roles.name: Daily Planet Editor-in-Chief
roles.description: Sets the front page — leads all marketing craft and sets the campaign tone.

roles.name: Senior Daily Planet Reporter
roles.description: Veteran reporter — designs campaign strategy and hunts the lead story.

roles.name: Daily Planet Cub Reporter
roles.description: Carries the campaign into the field — content, creative, and chasing the daily scoop.

roles.name: Wayne Enterprises Analyst
roles.description: Translates between the boardroom and the Batcave — captures requirements and stakeholder intent.

roles.name: Senior Bat-Gadget Engineer — USA
roles.description: Master engineer of the Batcave workshop — leads complex builds and mentors the junior smiths.

roles.name: Sidekick Consultant — Mumbai
roles.description: First mission rookie — shadows the Titans and learns the platform under close supervision.

_realmNotes: windowOffsetWeeks values are negative so every realm starts in the past — past weeks get Time Entries, future weeks get Schedules. Workstreams are organised as parent scope items (each with 2 child sub-scopes), each themed to the team's mission and base of operations.

workstreams.name: Testing at the Hall of Justice

realms.projectName: Teen Titans — Titans Tower Mission Hub
Suicide Squad — Task Force X Black-Ops Console

justice-league.name: Founders Assemble
justice-league.description: Discovery sign-off — the seven founders convene aboard the Watchtower.

justice-league.name: Teleporters Online
justice-league.description: Build kickoff: Zeta tube grid hot, comms across the planet.

justice-league.name: Crisis Tabletop
justice-league.description: Mid-project gate: multiverse-threat tabletop with the Founders.

justice-league.name: Phase Invoice — Brainiac Op
justice-league.description: Phase invoice trigger: post-Brainiac operation billing.

justice-league.name: Watchtower Go-Live
justice-league.description: Go-Live: orbital command in full production.

justice-league.name: Hand-off to the League
justice-league.description: Hyper-care close: ops handed to the standing roster.

bat-family.name: Cave Lights On
bat-family.description: Project kickoff: Batcave power-up, Batcomputer warm.

bat-family.name: Bat-Signal Integration
bat-family.description: Build phase: GCPD signal wired into the casework system.

bat-family.name: Arkham Breakout Drill
bat-family.description: UAT gate: simulate a full Arkham breakout — system holds.

bat-family.name: Phase Invoice — Wayne Foundation
bat-family.description: Phase invoice: Wayne Foundation funding tranche released.

bat-family.name: Casework System Live
bat-family.description: Go-Live: every Bat in the field on the new system.

bat-family.name: Alfred Signs Off
bat-family.description: Hyper-care close: Alfred stamps the project complete.

teen-titans.name: Tower Topping-Out
teen-titans.description: Discovery: T-Tower power and comms commissioned.

teen-titans.name: Forge the Mission Console
teen-titans.description: Build: mission-control console online, mentor links wired.

teen-titans.name: H.I.V.E. Live-Fire
teen-titans.description: UAT gate: live-fire drill against H.I.V.E. operatives.

teen-titans.name: Phase Invoice — Wayne Grant
teen-titans.description: Phase invoice: Wayne Foundation youth-grant tranche.

teen-titans.name: Titans Go!
teen-titans.description: Go-Live: Titans deployed on full mission roster.

teen-titans.name: Mentor Hand-off
teen-titans.description: Hyper-care close: senior mentors release the team.

suicide-squad.name: Waller's Greenlight
suicide-squad.description: Discovery sign-off: Amanda Waller approves the mission package.

suicide-squad.name: Nano-Bomb Calibration
suicide-squad.description: Build: tracking + compliance module wired to every asset.

suicide-squad.name: Belle Reve Audit
suicide-squad.description: UAT gate: A.R.G.U.S. audit of console + asset roster.

suicide-squad.name: Phase Invoice — Black Budget
suicide-squad.description: Phase invoice: black-budget tranche released to vendor.

suicide-squad.name: Mission Console Live
suicide-squad.description: Go-Live: Task Force X operating from the new console.

suicide-squad.name: Extraction Complete
suicide-squad.description: Hyper-care close: assets returned to Belle Reve, ops debrief.

Bruce Wayne.notes: Wayne Enterprises board week — public-facing engagements.

Dick Grayson.notes: Bludhaven PD shift swap — covering for Amy.

Barbara Gordon.notes: Gotham Library benefit — Oracle stays offline.

Alfred.notes: Annual return to the West End — visiting old friends.

Damian Wayne.notes: Veterinary appointment for Titus the Great Dane.

Superman.notes: Daily Planet deadline week — Clark Kent on byline duty.

Flash.notes: Central City CSI court appearance — Barry Allen testifying.

Aquaman.notes: Atlantean coronation duties — surface comms limited.

tasks.name: Summon the Justice League
tasks.description: Run the kickoff workshop and align on scope, roles, and timeline.

tasks.name: Investigate from the Batcave
tasks.description: Gather and document requirements with the client stakeholders.

tasks.name: Plans on the Watchtower
tasks.description: Produce the solution design and review it with the client.

tasks.name: Forge the Plan
tasks.description: Build and configure the solution per the approved design.

tasks.name: Test in the Fortress of Solitude
tasks.description: Run user acceptance testing and triage the feedback.

tasks.name: Defend Metropolis
tasks.description: Execute the go-live cutover and confirm production readiness.

tasks.name: Raise the Watchtower
tasks.description: Stand up the managed-service environment and runbooks.

tasks.name: Sound the Bat-Signal
tasks.description: Hold the service kickoff and confirm SLAs and escalation paths.

tasks.name: Wire the Batcomputer
tasks.description: Implement monitoring, automation, and support processes.

tasks.name: Pass the Cape
tasks.description: Transition the service into active management.

tasks.name: League Debrief
tasks.description: Stabilize the service and review the first support cycle.

tasks.name: Assemble the League
tasks.description: Kick off the initiative and confirm goals and owners.

tasks.name: Detective Work
tasks.description: Assess the current state and define success criteria.

tasks.name: Strategy in the Hall of Justice
tasks.description: Draft the approach and circulate it for internal review.

tasks.name: The Patrol
tasks.description: Execute the work and track progress to plan.

tasks.name: Protect the City
tasks.description: Roll out internally and communicate the change.

tasks.name: A Case for the Dark Knight
tasks.description: Align with the stakeholder on scope and deadline.

tasks.name: Gather the Clues
tasks.description: Capture the requirements for the deliverable.

tasks.name: Close the Case
tasks.description: Complete the deliverable.

tasks.name: Report to the Commissioner
tasks.description: Deliver and review the work with the stakeholder.
